objective:
[Scalp de continuation / micro-retournement] sur [crypto liquide] [5m ou 15m].
Indicateurs : [EMA 9/21/50] + [RSI 14] + [Bandes de Bollinger 20,2].
Entrées : [pullback vers EMA 21 avec RSI repartant dans le sens de la micro-tendance et rejet d’une bande] / [excès sur bande externe avec RSI en surachat/survente et signal de retournement court terme].
Sorties : [take-profit sur extension vers bande opposée ou prochain niveau de structure] / [sortie anticipée si clôture franche contre la position ou divergence RSI].
Risk management : [stop-loss sous dernier plus bas/haut local ou 1× ATR] / [ratio minimum 1,5] / [risque fixe 1–2 % du capital par trade].

iterations.hypothesis: The combination of Bollinger Bands, EMA, and RSI provides a robust system for identifying potential trend continuations or reversals. The Bollinger Bands indicate volatility levels and potential reversals when prices hit the extremes, while EMA helps confirm the trend direction. RSI ensures that the price is not overextended and adds a momentum component to the analysis. This setup should capture profitable scalping opportunities with tight risk management.

This strategy combines the Bollinger Bands to identify overbought and oversold conditions, EMA to filter trend direction, and RSI to confirm strength. The combination should capture pullbacks in the direction of the trend with strong momentum.

iterations.hypothesis: The combination of Bollinger Bands, RSI, and EMA indicators will help identify potential reversals or continuations by capturing overbought/oversold conditions, trend direction, and volatility. The EMA acts as a trend filter, while RSI provides momentum signals, and Bollinger Bands offer support/resistance levels.

The combination of Bollinger Bands, RSI, and EMA filters will create a robust system that captures high-probability scalp trades on liquid crypto pairs. The Bollinger Bands provide over/under extensions for entry signals, while the RSI ensures that the trend has enough momentum to sustain a move. The EMA helps confirm the direction of the trend by ensuring that price is above or below the EMA.
